name: Fix a race condition in async code
description: A cache module has a thundering herd problem. Multiple concurrent calls to the same key trigger duplicate fetches. Must implement proper deduplication.
prompt: The cache in src/cache.js has a thundering herd bug: when multiple concurrent calls request the same key, it fetches multiple times instead of deduplicating. Fix getCached() so concurrent calls to the same key only trigger one fetch. Do not change test.js. Make `node test.js` pass.
